ranked_opportunities.verdict: Location-intelligence unicorn ($100M ARR) hiring Director-level strategic partnerships role to build new public-sector channel (NASPO/OMNIA reseller mechanisms) and commercial workflow integrations (Snowflake, Databricks, Alteryx). The JD reads almost word-for-word like Paul's market-builder profile: build from inception, multi-stakeholder partnerships, public sector procurement, data licensing. Fully remote at $210-240K OTE. Only friction is mission alignment — Placer's customers are retail/CRE/finance/government, not climate/conservation, so this is a domain pivot toward the data-platform-builder framing of his identity rather than the environmental-mission framing.
ranked_opportunities.doc_note: Full deep dive completed. Top SCQA: Two-Sided Partnership Architecture (86.5/100). Resume + Cover Letter in ~/Desktop/Jobs/Placer.ai/
ranked_opportunities.hook: JD almost literally written for Paul's market-builder profile — build new partnerships function from inception, public sector + commercial channels, fully remote, $210-240K OTE. Domain pivot from environmental but data-licensing pattern is identical.

ranked_opportunities.verdict: Series B methane emissions data platform, post-2023 strategic repositioning to enterprise platform from certification body, $111M Insight Partners-led growth round behind it. WEC fee escalation (Jan 2025 $900/ton to $1,500/ton by 2026) is the most important commercial event in this market in a decade and creates exactly the regulatory-pressure-into-commercial-demand pattern Paul has built around. KSAT customer list (Shell, ExxonMobil, ConocoPhillips, Total, ENI) overlaps directly with Project Canary's O&G buyer base. Paul has confirmed willingness to relocate from Taos to Denver, removing the prior geographic friction. Score upgraded from 71.5 to 76.5 (Tier 1).

ranked_opportunities.verdict: Series A ($38.6M raised) RF/SDR platform startup founded by ex-SpaceX engineer John Malsbury. Commercial-leaning VC base (Upfront, BlueYard, Balerion) signals genuine commercial focus rather than defense-primary. Vast Space confirmed as commercial reference for Haven-1 station. 4 missions in orbit, 12 planned 2026. ~40 employees scaling to 100+. Director title at this size is functionally founding commercial lead for US Commercial Space vertical. $300-400K OTE plus Series A equity is exceptional. Soft blocker: dual-use defense overlay is real and Paul would encounter defense conversations even in the explicitly Commercial Space role; worth a single discovery conversation to confirm role-day-to-day mix before deeper engagement. Paul has confirmed Denver willingness.
